description: to_octets splits on dots and returns a list of ints; to_ip joins numbers back into a dotted string; same_network compares the first `prefix` octets and returns a bool.
Handles 0.0.0.0 and 255.255.255.255; returns ints not strings; a prefix of 1 only checks the first octet; identical addresses match at any prefix.
same_network reuses to_octets instead of re-splitting by hand; clear names; a return on every path.
